name: multitenant-template
description: A production-grade Next.js + Supabase multitenant starter (Company ↔ Workspace). Installable pieces: AGENTS.md, llms.txt, supabase migrations, lib helpers, route conventions, recipes.
author: Multitenant Template Authors

items.name: agents-instructions
items.title: AGENTS.md — Universal agent rules
items.description: Vendor-neutral rules for any AI coding agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot, open-source). Reading order for agents, conventions, antipatterns, mandatory pre-commit checklist.

items.name: llms-txt
items.title: llms.txt — LLM-discoverable repo map
items.description: llmstxt.org-spec repository navigation map. Optional companion `llms-ctx.txt` excludes the Optional section for tight context budgets.

items.name: conventions
items.title: docs/CONVENTIONS.md — Naming, layout, antipatterns
items.description: Prose version of AGENTS.md, with worked examples. Pair them: AGENTS.md for agents, CONVENTIONS.md for humans.

items.name: recipes
items.title: docs/RECIPES.md — Canonical copy-pasteable recipes
items.description: Six recipes: tenant-scoped table, typed route handler, tenant-scoped page, admin operation, auth flow, env var. Use as templates — do not invent your own structure.

items.name: supabase-migrations
items.title: All Supabase migrations (0001–0005)
items.description: companies, workspaces, profiles, memberships + RLS + custom_access_token_hook + helper functions + notes example. Drop into supabase/migrations/ of a Next.js + Supabase project.

items.name: supabase-config
items.title: supabase/config.toml — Local Supabase configuration
items.description: Pre-configured port (54321), auth redirects for *.tuapp.local, inbucket for magic-link email capture.

items.name: supabase-seed
items.title: supabase/seed.sql — Demo company + workspaces
items.description: 1 company (acme) + 2 workspaces (marketing, sales) + a demo membership that activates once a user exists.

items.name: lib-env
items.title: lib/env.ts — Zod-validated env (fail-fast)
items.description: Validated environment loader that crashes the process with a clear message if any var is missing or malformed.

items.name: lib-supabase-clients
items.title: Supabase clients (server, browser, service)
items.description: Three carefully-scoped clients. Server: RLS-respecting. Browser: for Client Components. Service: RLS-bypassing for admin operations only. Plus typed Database shape.

items.name: lib-tenant-resolution
items.title: Tenant resolution (host → company, path → workspace)
items.description: Parsing helpers, RLS-aware DB lookups with TTL cache, and the ActiveContext type that any server-side code can read.

items.name: lib-api-helpers
items.title: API response helpers + handler wrapper
items.description: `ok`/`warn`/`err` builders, `withApi()` wrapper that enforces no-store cache headers and maps errors uniformly. Catalog of ApiErrorCode values.

items.name: proxy-tenant-resolution
items.title: proxy.ts — Tenant resolution + auth refresh
items.description: The single source of truth for resolving the tenant on each request. Validates the JWT, refreshes if needed, applies no-store headers, forwards x-company-id / x-workspace-id / x-user-id to downstream code.

items.name: app-tenant-skeleton
items.title: Protected tenant layout + dashboard + settings + API routes
items.description: Demonstrates how Server Components, Client Components, Server Actions, and Route Handlers live together in the tenant-scoped area. Includes workspace switcher + magic-link sign-out.

items.name: app-auth-skeleton
items.title: Magic-link auth flow (login + callback + request endpoint)
items.description: Magic-link sign-in page, the request endpoint that sends the email, and the callback that exchanges the code for a session and redirects to the user's first workspace.
